description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with clean geometric lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The structure is surrounded by a perimeter wall and features multiple outdoor spaces, including a front patio with greenery and a rear garden area with trees. The house is set on a corner lot, bordered by two intersecting roads, and includes a driveway and covered parking area. Large windows and sliding glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor spaces. The landscaping incorporates palm trees and shrubs, enhancing the contemporary feel. The overall design emphasizes open, functional living spaces with a strong indoor-outdoor relationship.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with perimeter walls, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas on a corner lot.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the street corner, highlighting the front patio, driveway, and main entrance with visible greenery.
description_view_1: View 1 reveals the rear garden area with trees and a more private section of the house, as well as the side wall facing the street.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the back and side of the house, showing the rear garden and the flat roof's expanse.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the house from the opposite street, emphasizing the long side wall, outdoor patio, and the relationship to the road.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a small overhang, adjacent to a landscaped patio and driveway, with minimal decorative elements.
